caption: A man with glasses and long hair pulled back performs on a stage in front of a neutral, slatted wall background. He wears a white collared shirt under a dark blue vest featuring intricate embroidery on the lapels and a decorative red-and-white pattern on the lower front. He stands behind a microphone stand and holds a light-colored acoustic guitar. The heads of several audience members are visible in the foreground, their backs to the camera. In the middle of the scene, the text "ORCA" is displayed in white, capitalized letters. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in place, singing into the microphone while slightly shifting his posture and adjusting his grip on the guitar. The camera remains stationary, capturing a steady medium shot of the performer as he delivers his musical performance.
